svg.aria-label: A power strip: essential plugs stay in, the least important are pulled first when power runs short
svg.content: <mxfile host="app.diagrams.net"> <diagram name="analogy-power-strip"><mxGraphModel dx="900" dy="440" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="900" pageHeight="380" math="0" shadow="0" background="#0b1020"> <root> <mxCell id="0"/> <mxCell id="1" parent="0"/> <mxCell id="title" value="When power runs short, the least important is unplugged first" style="text;html=1;align=left;fontSize=20;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#eef2ff;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="40" y="24" width="760" height="28" as="geometry"/></mxCell> <mxCell id="sub" value="The fridge stays on. The fairy lights can wait." style="text;html=1;align=left;fontSize=13;fontColor=#9aa6c8;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="40" y="54" width="760" height="20" as="geometry"/></mxCell> <mxCell id="g1" value="STAYS ON" style="text;html=1;align=right;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#34d399;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="440" y="136" width="120" height="20" as="geometry"/></mxCell> height="20" as="geometry"/></mxCell> <mxCell id="g3" value="UNPLUGGED" style="text;html=1;align=right;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#9aa6c8;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="440" y="242" svg.text: When power runs short, the least important is unplugged first
The fridge stays on. The fairy lights can wait.
